requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Rwanda
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质——卢旺达无横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質——盧旺達無橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Rwanda does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal restriction-of-hazardous-substances (RoHS) regime for general electrical and electronic products. There is no Rwandan equivalent that mandates the EU RoHS 2 (Directive 2011/65/EU) restricted-substance list (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE and the four added phthalates) as a market-entry condition for LED lighting. Consequently, there is no local RoHS declaration to map against and no RoHS test report that the RSB PVoC programme requires by default. Substance controls that do apply come indirectly via product safety standards (for example mercury content limits embedded in the relevant IEC lamp standards) and any general chemicals / waste rules, not via a horizontal RoHS list. State this plainly to the importer rather than implying a Rwandan RoHS equivalent exists.
summary.zh: 卢旺达对一般电气电子产品并未实行欧盟式横向有害物质限制（RoHS）制度。不存在将欧盟 RoHS 2（指令 2011/65/EU）限制物质清单（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及新增四项邻苯二甲酸酯）作为 LED 照明市场准入条件的卢旺达等效要求。因此，不存在可对照的本地 RoHS 声明，RSB PVoC 计划默认也不要求 RoHS 检测报告。实际适用的物质控制是间接通过产品安全标准（例如相关 IEC 灯标准中内嵌的汞含量限值）及任何一般化学品／废物规则，而非通过横向 RoHS 清单。应向进口商如实说明，而非暗示存在卢旺达 RoHS 等效要求。
summary.zht: 盧旺達對一般電氣電子產品並未實行歐盟式橫向有害物質限制（RoHS）制度。不存在將歐盟 RoHS 2（指令 2011/65/EU）限制物質清單（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及新增四項鄰苯二甲酸酯）作為 LED 照明市場准入條件的盧旺達等效要求。因此，不存在可對照的本地 RoHS 聲明，RSB PVoC 計劃默認也不要求 RoHS 檢測報告。實際適用的物質控制是間接通過產品安全標準（例如相關 IEC 燈標準中內嵌的汞含量限值）及任何一般化學品／廢物規則，而非通過橫向 RoHS 清單。應向進口商如實說明，而非暗示存在盧旺達 RoHS 等效要求。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS-equivalent regulation in force in Rwanda for general electricals (confirmed absence)
Substance limits apply only indirectly via RS / IEC product-safety standards (e.g. mercury limits embedded in lamp standards)

summary.en: China operates its own hazardous-substance regime for electrical and electronic products (China RoHS) under the Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products, with marking and declaration per the GB/T 26572 limits and SJ/T 11364 marking (the orange e / green circle marks) and the GB 30255-adjacent conformity / catalogue mechanisms. China RoHS covers lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB and PBDE. This China RoHS evidence is a domestic obligation; it is not required by Rwanda and is not a Rwandan market-entry condition.
summary.zh: 中国对电气电子产品实行自有的有害物质制度（中国 RoHS），依据《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》，按 GB/T 26572 限值与 SJ/T 11364 标识（橙色 e／绿色圆圈标志）进行标识与声明，并配合合格评定／达标管理目录机制。中国 RoHS 涵盖铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB 及 PBDE。该中国 RoHS 证据为境内义务；卢旺达并不要求，亦非卢旺达市场准入条件。
summary.zht: 中國對電氣電子產品實行自有的有害物質制度（中國 RoHS），依據《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》，按 GB/T 26572 限值與 SJ/T 11364 標識（橙色 e／綠色圓圈標誌）進行標識與聲明，並配合合格評定／達標管理目錄機制。中國 RoHS 涵蓋鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB 及 PBDE。該中國 RoHS 證據為境內義務；盧旺達並不要求，亦非盧旺達市場准入條件。

standards_or_laws: Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (China RoHS)
GB/T 26572 — concentration limits; SJ/T 11364 — marking of restricted-substance information

gap.en: This is an inverse gap: China imposes a hazardous-substance regime (China RoHS, GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364), while Rwanda imposes no horizontal RoHS requirement on LED lighting. So a Chinese exporter already holding China RoHS documentation has MORE than Rwanda requires on this axis — there is nothing additional to declare for a Rwandan RoHS, because none exists. Do not fabricate a Rwandan RoHS declaration. The only substance constraints to watch are those embedded in the adopted RS / IEC safety standards (e.g. mercury limits) and any future general chemicals / e-waste rules. If a customer contractually asks for RoHS, that is a private buyer requirement, not a Rwandan regulatory one.
gap.zh: 这是一个反向差距：中国施加有害物质制度（中国 RoHS，GB/T 26572／SJ/T 11364），而卢旺达对 LED 照明不施加横向 RoHS 要求。因此，已持有中国 RoHS 文件的中国出口商在此维度上拥有的已超出卢旺达所需——无须为卢旺达 RoHS 额外声明，因为并不存在该制度。切勿虚构卢旺达 RoHS 声明。唯一须留意的物质约束是采用的 RS／IEC 安全标准中内嵌者（如汞限值）及任何未来一般化学品／电子废物规则。若客户在合同中要求 RoHS，那是私人买方要求，而非卢旺达法规要求。
gap.zht: 這是一個反向差距：中國施加有害物質制度（中國 RoHS，GB/T 26572／SJ/T 11364），而盧旺達對 LED 照明不施加橫向 RoHS 要求。因此，已持有中國 RoHS 文件的中國出口商在此維度上擁有的已超出盧旺達所需——無須為盧旺達 RoHS 額外聲明，因為並不存在該制度。切勿虛構盧旺達 RoHS 聲明。唯一須留意的物質約束是採用的 RS／IEC 安全標準中內嵌者（如汞限值）及任何未來一般化學品／電子廢物規則。若客戶在合同中要求 RoHS，那是私人買方要求，而非盧旺達法規要求。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable — no horizontal RoHS regime in force in Rwanda for general electricals; no Rwandan RoHS declaration required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (China RoHS) — restricted-substance marking / declaration under GB/T 26572 and SJ/T 11364 for in-scope electrical and electronic products

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rwanda has no horizontal RoHS regime for LED lighting, so there is no Rwandan RoHS declaration to provide and none should be fabricated. China's own China RoHS (GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364) is a domestic obligation that exceeds what Rwanda requires on this axis. Watch only substance limits embedded in adopted RS / IEC safety standards; any RoHS request from a buyer is contractual, not regulatory in Rwanda.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达对 LED 照明无横向 RoHS 制度，故无须提供卢旺达 RoHS 声明，亦不应虚构。中国自有的中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572／SJ/T 11364）为境内义务，在此维度上已超出卢旺达所需。仅须留意采用的 RS／IEC 安全标准中内嵌的物质限值；买方任何 RoHS 要求在卢旺达属合同性质而非法规要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達對 LED 照明無橫向 RoHS 制度，故無須提供盧旺達 RoHS 聲明，亦不應虛構。中國自有的中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572／SJ/T 11364）為境內義務，在此維度上已超出盧旺達所需。僅須留意採用的 RS／IEC 安全標準中內嵌的物質限值；買方任何 RoHS 要求在盧旺達屬合同性質而非法規要求。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Approval for Connected / Smart Lamps (RURA type approval)
requirement_topic.zh: 联网／智能灯的无线电批准（RURA 型号核准）
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網／智能燈的無線電批准（RURA 型號核准）

summary.en: LED lamps or luminaires with an intentional radio transmitter (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee or other RF control) need radio type approval / authorization from RURA (Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority) in addition to the RSB PVoC safety / EMC route. RURA governs the use of the radio spectrum and the approval of radio equipment placed on the Rwandan market. The radio module's frequency bands, power and conformance (typically against ETSI / IEC-aligned RF standards) must be acceptable to RURA. Non-radio LED lighting does not need RURA approval and is handled solely through the RSB PVoC programme.
summary.zh: 带有意发射器（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或其他射频控制）的 LED 灯或灯具，除 RSB PVoC 安全／EMC 路径外，还须取得 RURA（卢旺达公用事业监管局）的无线电型号核准／授权。RURA 管理无线电频谱使用及投放卢旺达市场的无线电设备批准。无线电模块的频段、功率与符合性（通常对照 ETSI／IEC 对齐的射频标准）须为 RURA 所接受。非无线 LED 照明无须 RURA 批准，仅通过 RSB PVoC 计划处理。
summary.zht: 帶有意發射器（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或其他射頻控制）的 LED 燈或燈具，除 RSB PVoC 安全／EMC 路徑外，還須取得 RURA（盧旺達公用事業監管局）的無線電型號核准／授權。RURA 管理無線電頻譜使用及投放盧旺達市場的無線電設備批准。無線電模組的頻段、功率與符合性（通常對照 ETSI／IEC 對齊的射頻標準）須為 RURA 所接受。非無線 LED 照明無須 RURA 批准，僅通過 RSB PVoC 計劃處理。

standards_or_laws: RURA (Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority) — radio equipment type approval / authorization for intentional transmitters
RF conformance to ETSI / IEC-aligned radio standards acceptable to RURA (frequency, power, spectrum)

summary.en: In China, radio transmitters in connected lighting require a Radio Type Approval (formerly SRRC / now administered under the State Radio Regulation framework / MIIT radio-transmission-equipment type approval). Connected products may also fall under CCC and network-access requirements. This Chinese radio approval is a domestic authorization tied to Chinese spectrum allocations; it is not recognised by RURA and does not substitute for a Rwandan radio approval.
summary.zh: 在中国，联网照明中的无线电发射器须取得无线电发射设备型号核准（原 SRRC／现纳入国家无线电管理框架／工信部无线电发射设备型号核准）。联网产品还可能涉及 CCC 及入网要求。该中国无线电核准为与中国频谱划分挂钩的境内授权；不被 RURA 承认，亦不能替代卢旺达无线电批准。
summary.zht: 在中國，聯網照明中的無線電發射器須取得無線電發射設備型號核准（原 SRRC／現納入國家無線電管理框架／工信部無線電發射設備型號核准）。聯網產品還可能涉及 CCC 及入網要求。該中國無線電核准為與中國頻譜劃分掛鈎的境內授權；不被 RURA 承認，亦不能替代盧旺達無線電批准。

standards_or_laws: China Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (MIIT / former SRRC) for intentional radio transmitters
Network-access licence where applicable for connected products

gap.en: Both China and Rwanda regulate intentional radio transmitters, but through different authorities and spectrum frameworks: China via MIIT radio type approval; Rwanda via RURA. The Chinese radio approval is not transferable — a separate RURA authorization is required for the radio module, referencing frequency bands and power levels acceptable in Rwanda (which align to regional / ITU Region-1 allocations and may differ from China's). This RURA step is in addition to, not part of, the RSB PVoC safety / EMC route. For non-radio LED lighting this row does not apply.
gap.zh: 中国与卢旺达均监管有意无线电发射器，但通过不同主管部门与频谱框架：中国经工信部无线电型号核准；卢旺达经 RURA。中国无线电核准不可转移——无线电模块须取得单独的 RURA 授权，引用卢旺达可接受的频段与功率（与区域／ITU 第一区划分对齐，可能与中国不同）。该 RURA 步骤是在 RSB PVoC 安全／EMC 路径之外，而非其组成部分。对于非无线 LED 照明，本行不适用。
gap.zht: 中國與盧旺達均監管有意無線電發射器，但通過不同主管部門與頻譜框架：中國經工信部無線電型號核准；盧旺達經 RURA。中國無線電核准不可轉移——無線電模組須取得單獨的 RURA 授權，引用盧旺達可接受的頻段與功率（與區域／ITU 第一區劃分對齊，可能與中國不同）。該 RURA 步驟是在 RSB PVoC 安全／EMC 路徑之外，而非其組成部分。對於非無線 LED 照明，本行不適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for connected / radio-enabled lamps — RURA radio type approval / authorization required in addition to the RSB PVoC route; not applicable to non-radio lighting
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for radio transmitters — China radio transmission equipment type approval (MIIT); network-access licence where applicable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connected / smart LED lamps with a radio transmitter need RURA radio type approval in Rwanda, in addition to the RSB PVoC safety / EMC route. China's MIIT radio type approval is a domestic authorization and is not recognised by RURA. Non-radio LED lighting does not need RURA approval. Confirm acceptable frequency bands and power with RURA for the specific module.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 带无线电发射器的联网／智能 LED 灯在卢旺达须取得 RURA 无线电型号核准，作为 RSB PVoC 安全／EMC 路径之外的要求。中国工信部无线电型号核准为境内授权，不被 RURA 承认。非无线 LED 照明无须 RURA 批准。须就具体模块向 RURA 确认可接受的频段与功率。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 帶無線電發射器的聯網／智能 LED 燈在盧旺達須取得 RURA 無線電型號核准，作為 RSB PVoC 安全／EMC 路徑之外的要求。中國工信部無線電型號核准為境內授權，不被 RURA 承認。非無線 LED 照明無須 RURA 批准。須就具體模組向 RURA 確認可接受的頻段與功率。

requirement_topic.en: Packaging, E-Waste & Battery — No EU-Style Horizontal Regimes
requirement_topic.zh: 包装、电子废物与电池——无欧盟式横向制度
requirement_topic.zht: 包裝、電子廢物與電池——無歐盟式橫向制度

summary.en: Rwanda does NOT operate EU-style horizontal producer-responsibility regimes equivalent to the EU Packaging, WEEE (e-waste) and Battery Regulations as conditions for placing LED lighting on the market. Rwanda does have national environmental and e-waste policy direction (including e-waste management efforts and restrictions on certain single-use plastics), but these are not the same as the EU's product-level RoHS/WEEE/Battery market-entry obligations and do not generate an EU-equivalent declaration for a consignment of LED lamps. Where an LED product contains a battery (e.g. emergency or portable units), handle the battery under product-safety standards and any applicable transport (UN 38.3) and import rules rather than under an EU Battery Regulation analogue. Confirm current environmental / packaging rules with the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 卢旺达并未将等同于欧盟包装、WEEE（电子废物）及电池法规的欧盟式横向生产者责任制度，作为 LED 照明市场投放条件。卢旺达确有国家环境与电子废物政策方向（包括电子废物管理工作及对某些一次性塑料的限制），但其与欧盟产品层面的 RoHS/WEEE/电池市场准入义务不同，不会就一批 LED 灯产生欧盟等效声明。若 LED 产品含电池（如应急或便携单元），应在产品安全标准及任何适用运输（UN 38.3）与进口规则下处理电池，而非依据欧盟电池法规类比。须向在地进口商确认现行环境／包装规则。
summary.zht: 盧旺達並未將等同於歐盟包裝、WEEE（電子廢物）及電池法規的歐盟式橫向生產者責任制度，作為 LED 照明市場投放條件。盧旺達確有國家環境與電子廢物政策方向（包括電子廢物管理工作及對某些一次性塑料的限制），但其與歐盟產品層面的 RoHS/WEEE/電池市場准入義務不同，不會就一批 LED 燈產生歐盟等效聲明。若 LED 產品含電池（如應急或便攜單元），應在產品安全標準及任何適用運輸（UN 38.3）與進口規則下處理電池，而非依據歐盟電池法規類比。須向在地進口商確認現行環境／包裝規則。

standards_or_laws: No EU-equivalent horizontal Packaging / WEEE / Battery producer-responsibility regime as a market-entry condition in Rwanda (confirmed absence)
National environmental / e-waste policy and single-use-plastic restrictions apply at a general level, not as a per-consignment product declaration
Battery transport handled via UN 38.3 and import rules where a battery is present

summary.en: China addresses these through separate domestic mechanisms: the China RoHS regime (GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364) for hazardous substances; extended-producer-responsibility and recycling policies for electrical/electronic products and packaging; and GB battery-safety standards plus UN 38.3 for lithium battery transport. These are Chinese domestic obligations and recycling/EPR schemes; they are not the same as, and do not satisfy, any Rwandan environmental requirement, but they also exceed what Rwanda imposes as a market-entry condition on LED lighting.
summary.zh: 中国通过各自独立的境内机制处理这些方面：有害物质方面的中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572／SJ/T 11364）；电气电子产品与包装的生产者责任延伸及回收政策；以及 GB 电池安全标准加锂电池运输的 UN 38.3。这些为中国境内义务及回收／EPR 机制；其与任何卢旺达环境要求不同、亦不满足之，但同时也超出卢旺达就 LED 照明所设的市场准入条件。
summary.zht: 中國通過各自獨立的境內機制處理這些方面：有害物質方面的中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572／SJ/T 11364）；電氣電子產品與包裝的生產者責任延伸及回收政策；以及 GB 電池安全標準加鋰電池運輸的 UN 38.3。這些為中國境內義務及回收／EPR 機制；其與任何盧旺達環境要求不同、亦不滿足之，但同時也超出盧旺達就 LED 照明所設的市場准入條件。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS (GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364) and EPR / recycling policies for electrical-electronic products and packaging
GB battery-safety standards; UN 38.3 for lithium battery transport

gap.en: This is again an inverse / absence gap: Rwanda imposes no EU-style Packaging / WEEE / Battery producer-responsibility market-entry obligation on LED lighting, so there is no per-consignment environmental declaration to map against and none should be invented. The exporter's existing Chinese EPR / battery-transport documentation is more than Rwanda requires on this axis. The genuine constraints are practical: comply with general Rwandan environmental / single-use-plastic rules at importer level, and treat any contained battery under product-safety and UN 38.3 transport rules. State the absence of an EU-equivalent regime plainly so the importer is not led to expect one.
gap.zh: 这同样是反向／缺失差距：卢旺达对 LED 照明不施加欧盟式包装／WEEE／电池生产者责任市场准入义务，故不存在可对照的逐批环境声明，亦不应臆造。出口商现有的中国 EPR／电池运输文件在此维度上已超出卢旺达所需。真正的约束是务实层面的：在进口商层面遵守卢旺达一般环境／一次性塑料规则，并将任何内置电池按产品安全及 UN 38.3 运输规则处理。应如实说明不存在欧盟等效制度，以免进口商误以为存在。
gap.zht: 這同樣是反向／缺失差距：盧旺達對 LED 照明不施加歐盟式包裝／WEEE／電池生產者責任市場准入義務，故不存在可對照的逐批環境聲明，亦不應臆造。出口商現有的中國 EPR／電池運輸文件在此維度上已超出盧旺達所需。真正的約束是務實層面的：在進口商層面遵守盧旺達一般環境／一次性塑料規則，並將任何內置電池按產品安全及 UN 38.3 運輸規則處理。應如實說明不存在歐盟等效制度，以免進口商誤以為存在。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable as a market-entry condition — no EU-style Packaging / WEEE / Battery producer-responsibility regime for LED lighting in Rwanda; general environmental rules apply at importer level
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic obligations apply (China RoHS, EPR / recycling, GB battery safety, UN 38.3) but are separate from any Rwandan requirement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rwanda imposes no EU-style Packaging / WEEE / Battery producer-responsibility market-entry obligation on LED lighting, so no EU-equivalent environmental declaration is required and none should be fabricated. Comply with general Rwandan environmental / single-use-plastic rules at importer level, and handle any contained battery under product-safety and UN 38.3 transport rules. The exporter's Chinese EPR / battery documentation exceeds what Rwanda requires here.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达对 LED 照明不施加欧盟式包装／WEEE／电池生产者责任市场准入义务，故无须欧盟等效环境声明，亦不应虚构。在进口商层面遵守卢旺达一般环境／一次性塑料规则，并将任何内置电池按产品安全及 UN 38.3 运输规则处理。出口商的中国 EPR／电池文件在此已超出卢旺达所需。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達對 LED 照明不施加歐盟式包裝／WEEE／電池生產者責任市場准入義務，故無須歐盟等效環境聲明，亦不應虛構。在進口商層面遵守盧旺達一般環境／一次性塑料規則，並將任何內置電池按產品安全及 UN 38.3 運輸規則處理。出口商的中國 EPR／電池文件在此已超出盧旺達所需。
